Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service

package org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.praxisplatform.uischema.options
     
    org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service.jpa
     
  • Class
    Description
    AmbiguousOptionSourceProviderException
    Raised when provider ordering cannot select a single option-source provider.
    CompositeOptionSourceQueryExecutor
    Compatibility executor facade that delegates option-source execution to providers.
    DefaultOptionSourceContextResolver
    Default context resolver with no host-specific private attributes.
    DefaultOptionSourceProviderRegistry
    Default provider registry backed by Spring-discovered providers.
    OptionSourceCapabilityNotSupportedException
    Raised when an option-source exists but does not support the requested operation.
    OptionSourceContextResolver
    Resolves private provider execution context for option-source operations.
    OptionSourceExecutionContext
    Private execution context passed to option-source providers.
    OptionSourceExecutionRequest<E>
    Validated execution request passed from Praxis to an option-source provider.
    OptionSourceOperation
    Operation requested from an option-source provider.
    OptionSourceProvider
    Supported host extension point for option-source execution.
    OptionSourceProviderNotFoundException
    Raised when a registered option source has no provider for the requested operation.
    OptionSourceProviderRegistry
    Resolves the provider responsible for an option-source operation.
    OptionSourceQueryExecutor
    Internal executor contract for registered option sources.
    OptionSourceRequestValidator
    Validates public option-source request semantics before provider dispatch.

Built with ❤️ for fast, consistent, contract‑driven backends. Learn more.
